title: Identify and select explosive products
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and select explosive products demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify explosives applications

pcs.text: Identify job application and planned blasting operations in consultation with field manager or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job application and planned blasting operations in consultation with field manager or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job application and planned blasting operations in consultation with field manager or supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify site for blasting and check surrounding area to confirm safety considerations and actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site for blasting and check surrounding area to confirm safety considerations and actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site for blasting and check surrounding area to confirm safety considerations and actions.

pcs.text: Consider site characteristics and identify risks and potential hazards for blast site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider site characteristics and identify risks and potential hazards for blast site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider site characteristics and identify risks and potential hazards for blast site.

pcs.text: Consider environmental implications of intended explosives usage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider environmental implications of intended explosives usage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider environmental implications of intended explosives usage.

pcs.text: Consider available options for explosives for planned blasting operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider available options for explosives for planned blasting operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider available options for explosives for planned blasting operation.

pcs.text: Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when handling or using explosives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when handling or using explosives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures when handling or using explosives.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify explosives applications

elements.title: Select explosives components

pcs.text: Select explosives to meet planned blasting outcomes, site conditions and identified hazards of blasting site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select explosives to meet planned blasting outcomes, site conditions and identified hazards of blasting site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select explosives to meet planned blasting outcomes, site conditions and identified hazards of blasting site.

pcs.text: Ensure explosives and components are safe and not defective before use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure explosives and components are safe and not defective before use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure explosives and components are safe and not defective before use.

pcs.text: Calculate the explosive energy required for site characteristics to achieve planned blasting outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the explosive energy required for site characteristics to achieve planned blasting outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the explosive energy required for site characteristics to achieve planned blasting outcomes.

pcs.text: Prepare the quantity of explosive required to achieve the explosive energy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the quantity of explosive required to achieve the explosive energy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the quantity of explosive required to achieve the explosive energy.

pcs.text: Select the appropriate explosive initiator device according to industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select the appropriate explosive initiator device according to industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select the appropriate explosive initiator device according to industry best practice.

pcs.text: Select and use safety fuses to suit the application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use safety fuses to suit the application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use safety fuses to suit the application.

pcs.text: Ensure use of explosives complies with relevant legislative requirements and Australian Standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure use of explosives complies with relevant legislative requirements and Australian Standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure use of explosives complies with relevant legislative requirements and Australian Standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select explosives components
